textPlain: I really enjoy games like this where there's a balance between the real life context and simplifying them enough to have something to pick up and put down without having to have a ton of knowledge about the details.I'll be using this to teach my kid about arrivals.More stuff for plane fans:ATC Sim in the browser https://atc-sim.com/Various instrument simulators https://www.luizmonteiro.com/Learning.aspxVOR Simulator Pro from Pilot Institute https://hub.pilotinstitute.com/vor-download
